Consider the following information for three mutual funds, L, M, and N, and the market. Mean return Standard deviation Beta L 15 20 1.6 M 12 11 0.8 N 18 15 1.3 Market index 13 14 1.00 The mean risk-free rate was 8 percent. Calculate the Treynor measure, Sharpe measure, and Jensen measure for the three mutual funds and the market index.
